heading: Use of services, research and testing facilities of public agencies and independent laboratories
label: 5418 Use of services, research and testing facilities of public agencies and independent laboratories
text: The Secretary, in exercising the authority under this chapter, shall utilize the services, research and testing facilities of public agencies and independent testing laboratories to the maximum extent practicable in order to avoid duplication.
notes: Effective DateSection effective upon the expiration of 180 days following , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 22, 1974section 627 of Pub. L. 93–383section 5401 of this title
